data.name: Kinky Fight Club
data.detailed_description:
Kinky Fight Club is a 3D adult RPG about competitive sex matches. Imagine a sport where you and your opponents fuck, and whoever orgasms first loses!
That's the core of this game, Sexfights!

Become the champion of the KYFC octagon or sit back and spectate the kinkiest sex fights!
And the best part? You can customize every aspect of the match.

Game Features

You set the rules
KYFC is a fully customizable sex simulator for players with every taste:
  • Set your preferences: Hetero (M-F / F-M), Lesbian (Yuri), Gay (Yaoi), or anything you desire!
  • Active, Passive, Dominant or Submissive action, you choose
  • Optional Futanari and Neko toggles.

Customize your kinky fighters
Chose from 30 Unique characters or create your own in the Character creator:

  • Play with female, male or futanari characters
  • RPG-style attributes, weaknesses, resistances, and abilities
  • Size sliders for Boob, Booty, and Dick
  • Over 500 different options to customize your characters’ appearance and clothing

Realtime 3D sex simulator

  • Over 90 Different sex/foreplay movements to use!
  • Over 450 Original Sex Animations in the game
  • Activate and deactivate spectator mode whenever you want
  • Free Camera movement & varios Camera types to choose

A mode for every mood

  • Story
  • Arcade
  • Survival
  • Versus
  • Gallery

Fetishes & practices featured
Mild BDSM, Domination, Submission, Female Domination (FemDom), Male Domination (MaleDom), Futanari (Futa), Pegging / Futa on Male Strap-on on Female Strap-on on Male, Titjob, titfuck, Footjob, feet play, Oral sex, Vaginal sex, Spanking, Facesitting, Wrestling sex, Breast Smother / Ass Smother, Clothed Sex, Vanilla, Latex, Pantyhose, Muscular man, Neko, Bunny Suit, Glasses, Catsuits, Uniform, Lingerie, Stockings, Cosplay, Leotard …

data.short_description: Kinky Fight Club is a real-time 3D adult RPG about competitive sex fights. Become champion of the KYFC ring or sit back and watch the kinkiest fights! Customize every aspect of the match to create sexy experiences that match your mood and fantasies.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+, 8, 10, 64-bit versions only
  • 處理器: Intel core i3 2.8ghz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel hd integrated graphics or better
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 64-bit.
  • 處理器: Intel core i3 2.8ghz+
  • 顯示卡: Anything better than an integrated card
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
